action.reasoning:
Observation: Only ~1.8 minutes remaining. Best test score is 0.7453 from ESM2-t30 global embeddings (checkpoints/best.pt). The mutation-only model scored 0.2496 and ESM-based models time out during inference on 50K sequences. I have a T6 checkpoint that uses ESM2-t6 (much faster) with val=0.8829, but I haven't tested if it can process 50K sequences in time.

Analysis: With only ~1.8 minutes left, I cannot train anything new or run any meaningful experiments. My best submitted score is 0.7453. I should stop.

Decision: End the experiment. Best score achieved is 0.7453.
